name: Crockpot Turkey Breast
recipeIngredient: dry H.V. ranch salad dressing mix --
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice an onion and place it at the bottom of the crockpot.
2. Remove the skin from the turkey breast and season well with garlic powder, pepper, and any other spices desired (omit salt).
3. Place the seasoned turkey breast on top of the sliced onion in the crockpot.
4. Turn the crockpot to low and cook for eight hours.
5. Let the turkey breast rest for 20-30 minutes before carving.
